# User Story Template

## Story Metadata

- **Story ID**: [Unique identifier, e.g., US-001]
- **Title**: [Brief, descriptive title]
- **Priority**: [P0 (Critical) / P1 (High) / P2 (Medium) / P3 (Low)]
- **Story Points**: [Estimate: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, or ?]
- **Epic**: [Parent epic ID if applicable]
- **Sprint**: [Target sprint or release]

## User Story

```
As a [type of user/persona],
I want [some goal/desire],
So that [some benefit/reason].
```

### Example

```
As a startup founder,
I want to quickly convert my app idea into a prioritized task list,
So that I can start development with a clear roadmap.
```

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1: [Scenario Name]

```gherkin
Given [initial context/precondition]
When [action/trigger]
Then [expected outcome]
And [additional outcome if needed]
```

### Scenario 2: [Error/Edge Case]

```gherkin
Given [initial context/precondition]
When [action/trigger]
Then [error message/expected behavior]
```

### Checklist

- [ ] Criterion 1: [Description]
- [ ] Criterion 2: [Description]
- [ ] Criterion 3: [Description]

## Technical Requirements

- [ ] Requirement 1: [Description]
- [ ] Requirement 2: [Description]
- [ ] Requirement 3: [Description]

### Technical Notes

[Any technical considerations, API endpoints, database changes, etc.]

## Dependencies

### Depends On

- [ ] Story/Task ID: [Description of dependency]

### Blocks

- [ ] Story/Task ID: [Description of what this blocks]

## Definition of Done

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows style guidelines (ESLint/Prettier)
- [ ] Code reviewed by at least one team member
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
- [ ] No linting warnings

### Testing

- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Integration tests (if applicable) passing
- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified

### Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)

### Security

- [ ] Security review completed (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Resources

- [ ] Design mockup: [Link]
- [ ] API documentation: [Link]
- [ ] Related documentation: [Link]

## Implementation Notes

[Notes for the implementer, hints, gotchas, etc.]

## Questions / Clarifications

| Question     | Answer   | Date   |
| ------------ | -------- | ------ |
| [Question 1] | [Answer] | [Date] |
| [Question 2] | [Answer] | [Date] |

## History

| Date   | Action        | Author |
| ------ | ------------- | ------ |
| [Date] | Story created | [Name] |
| [Date] | [Action]      | [Name] |

---

_This template follows the User Story Engineer best practices. See [User Story Engineer Guide](../user-story-engineer.md) for details._
